title: Beyond the Horizon
description: This modpack expands game in fun and meaningful way.
body:
**Beyond the Horizon** is a modpack designed to make the game fun again, but not change the overall experience of the game. The main purpose is to kill Ender Dragon, just like in normal game.

 ### What you can exactly expect:
 
Decoration and updated cold weather

> Another Furniture 

> Snow! Real Magic! ⛄


New structures, biomes and updated world generation

 > Towns And Towers

 > Yung Mods

 > Atmospheric

 > Environmental

 > Geophlic Mod


Lots of new things to eat and drink

 > Neapolitan, Farmer's Delight
 > and it's addons

 Many visual enhancements, bugfixes and quality of life features

 > Simple Voice Chat

 > Advancement Plaques

 > Inventory HUD+


Good performance and support for shaders 


 >I think even a potato can run it

![AncientTeam](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9eca259ccb21523229f017be3ddcab76b26e2c49_0.webp)
